name: Black Bean Casserole Ole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beans, black, canned, rinsed and drained
1 lb Corn, whole kernel, canned, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350.
2. Lightly oil an 8-inch square baking pan or spray with a nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except cheesy sauce. Mix well.
4. Place mixture in prepared pan.
5. Drop cheesy sauce on top by spoonfuls.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 45 minutes.
